title: primula kialensis subsp. kialensis
intro: Primula kialensis subsp. kialensis, also known as the Tibetan primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Primula kialensis subsp. kialensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
